info.name: Clan of the Psychic Blade
info.description: The Psychic Blade subclass for the Crusader.
info.author: Guzufu

description.p: Project your will onto your blade with powerful psionic magic

In order to best protect the weak and force evil to bend the knee, some Crusaders have chosen to empower themselves through mastering psionics. As such, these Crusaders are able to push their physical gifts and sharpen them with mental quickness to use these new abilities to quash evil wherever it may root itself

You harbour a wellspring of psionic energy within yourself. This energy is represented by your Psionic Energy dice, which are each a d6. You have a number of these dice equal to twice your proficiency bonus, and they fuel various psionic powers you have, which are detailed below.

Some of your powers expend the Psionic Energy die they use, as specified in a power’s description, and you can’t use a power if it requires you to use a die when your dice are all expended. You regain all your expended Psionic Energy dice when you finish a long rest. In addition, as a bonus action, you can regain one expended Psionic Energy die, but you can’t do so again until you finish a short or long rest.
When you reach certain levels in this class, the size of your Psionic Energy dice increases: at 5th level (d8), 11th level (d10), and 17th level (d12). The powers below use your Psionic Energy dice.

Psionic Interception:As a reaction after a creature within 30 feet of you is targeted with an attack, you can choose to expend one of your Psionic Energy dice, roll it and subtract half of the roll from the attack, potentially causing it to miss. If the attack still hits, then the damage is reduced by the amount rolled.

Psionic Slash:As a bonus action, you wreathe psionic energy into your hand and strike at a foe. You attack a creature within 5 feet using your strength and on a hit, expend one of your psionic energy dice and roll it, then the creature takes psychic damage equal to the dice roll plus your strength modifier.

sheet.description: You can regain 1 expended die as a bonus action once per Short/Long Rest.

After a creature within 30 feet of you is targeted with an attack, you can choose to expend one of your Psionic Energy dice, roll it and subtract half of the roll from the attack, potentially causing it to miss. If the attack still hits, then the damage is reduced by the amount rolled.

You attack a creature within 5 feet using your strength and on a hit, expend one of your psionic energy dice and roll it, the creature takes psychic damage equal to the dice roll plus {{strength:modifier}}.

description.p: You have mastered new ways to use your psionic powers.

Psi-powered Teleportation:As a bonus action, your body begins to shift between space due to your psionic power. You roll one of your psionic energy dice. You then teleport a number of feet equal to 10 x the number rolled. You can use this feature once per long rest unless you expend a usage of your psionic energy dice to do it again.

Psionic Push:As a bonus action, you empower your body with psionic energy and expend it on an enemy within 30 feet. That creature must make a Strength saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your constitution modifier) and on a failure is pushed. You roll one of your psionic energy dice, then push a creature back a number of feet equal to 5 x the number you rolled. You can use this feature once per long rest unless you expend a usage of your psionic energy dice to do it again.

sheet.description: Your body begins to shift between space due to your psionic power. You roll one of your psionic energy dice. You then teleport a number of feet equal to 10 x the number rolled. You may expend a usage of your psionic energy dice to do it again.

A creature you target within 30ft must make a DC {{psionicpush:dc}} Strength saving throw and on a failure is pushed. You roll one of your psionic energy dice, then push a creature back a number of feet equal to 5 x the number you rolled. You may expend a usage of your psionic energy dice to do it again.

description.p: Starting from 11th level, your ability to protect yourself from enemies who target you mentally has increased greatly. You are granted resistance to psychic damage and you have advantage on saving throws against charm effects.

sheet.description: You have advantage on saving throws against charm effects.

description.p: At 15th level, when you hit a creature, you can choose to attempt to weaken that creature. After hitting the creature, you can force them to make a saving throw (DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your constitution modifier) instead of taking damage. On a failed save, the creature takes double damage from all attacks until the end of your next turn. You can use this feature once per long rest, unless you expend four of your psionic energy dice to use it again.

sheet.description: After hitting a creature, you can force them to make a DC {{cripplingweakness:dc}} saving throw instead of taking damage. On a failed save, the creature takes double damage from all attacks until the end of your next turn. You may expend four of your psionic energy dice to use this again.
